channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title: GPT Image 2 Prompt: symmetrical design featuring two elegant blue peacocks with detailed feather pat...
item.description:
GPT Image 2 Prompt: symmetrical design featuring two elegant blue peacocks with detailed feather patterns, surrounded by blue floral elements, intricate vintage botanical ornament, soft beige background, classical floral decor style with rich navy and sky blue details, decorative art illustration --ar 3:2
--- @dotey | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 200
item.author: @dotey

item.title:
Our teams have been busyyy! Here are some key updates from the past week:
— @GoogleCloud unveiled ...
item.description:
Our teams have been busyyy! Here are some key updates from the past week:
— @GoogleCloud unveiled a suite of AI innovations at our Cloud Next event, including our eighth generation TPUs (TPUt for inference + TPUi for reasoning), Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, Agentic Data cloud, Workspace Intelligence, and beyond
— Gemini Embedding 2, our natively multimodal embedding model, became generally available via the Gemini API and in Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform (the evolution of Vertex AI)
— @StitchbyGoogle open-sourced the draft specification for DESIGN.md, so it can be used across any single tool or platform
— New autonomous search agents, Deep Research and Deep Research Max, launched to bring MCP support, native visualizations, and unprecedented analytical quality to research workflows across the web or custom sources
— Google AI Pro and Ultra subscribers now get increased usage limits and access to Nano Banana Pro and Gemini Pro models in @GoogleAIStudio
— @GoogleDeepMind introduced Decoupled DiLoCo, our new resilient and flexible way to train advanced AI models across multiple data centers
--- @GoogleAI | ❤️ 33 | 🔁 4 | 💬 3 | 👁 1869
item.author: @GoogleAI

--- @Ronald_vanLoon | ❤️ 2 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 114
item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.title:
What a week at #GoogleCloudNext in Las Vegas ✨
From sessions to showfloor demos to networking event...
item.description:
What a week at #GoogleCloudNext in Las Vegas ✨
From sessions to showfloor demos to networking events, we were excited to partner with @GoogleCloud to advance how the AI ecosystem can build, deploy, and innovate in the cloud.
Looking forward to working together to advance AI agents, physical AI, and beyond.
--- @nvidia | ❤️ 19 | 🔁 4 | 💬 3 | 👁 3566
item.author: @nvidia

item.title:
Labnana 的用户对 GPT Images 2 并不满意，在人物审美方面，目前最强的 依然是 Banana Pro
这是一个神奇的网站，晚上的时候用户的IP是埃及和摩洛哥
没有一分钱推广预算，...
item.description:
Labnana 的用户对 GPT Images 2 并不满意，在人物审美方面，目前最强的 依然是 Banana Pro
这是一个神奇的网站，晚上的时候用户的IP是埃及和摩洛哥
没有一分钱推广预算，但是在全世界蔓延
--- @oran_ge | ❤️ 3 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 701
item.author: @oran_ge
